context: Sprint 3 Action 6 completed: Evaluate/remove CopilotKit entirely.
CopilotKit has been completely removed from the project since it's no longer needed.
Also uninstalled react-markdown and remark-gfm as they were just for the stub.
Cleaned up Vite configurations, Kakao dashboard frontend code, and backend API routes.
The main bundle size has dramatically dropped to ~825KB, fully completing the audit directives.

tasks_completed.item: Uninstalled CopilotKit dependencies and stub libraries
Removed unused database functions for coach events
